title: Kadhal Oru Butterfly Lyrics OK OK Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Aalaap Raju, Hemachandran, Sunitha Sarathy
Song:  Kadhal oru butterfly
Lyrics : Na MuthuKumar
Movie: Oru Kal Oru Kannadi (Ok Ok)

Vantha thottuko thottuko
paniva pattuko pattuko
mudinja ottiko ottiko
kannaal othiko othiko
tholaal thothiko thothiko
thaniya kathiko kathiko

kadhal oru butterfly pola varum
vanthaal adhu kannamoochi aadi vidum

Siru pillai pole pinnale oodu
kaanamal ponal kannale thedu
yemaatra paarkum pala murai
endraalum maatum oru murai
engedhan pogum adhu varai
poda nee kadhal varum varai
(vantha thottuko ..)

kadhal oru butterfly pola varum
vanthaal adhu kannamoochi aadi vidum

Nee ennai paarkum kudhookalathil
naan unnai paarpen paravasathil
Mazhai pozhiyaatho,nenjam ninaiyaatho
mana kadalukulley,alai adikaatho

Manathai solla vantha nerathil
en nenjai kattinaai adai kamabathil
Kulir paarvai vanthu ennai anaikaatho
andha alaipinale uyir pizhaikaatho

Minsaaram mele kai vaithu vitten
aanalum kanne virumbi thaan thottaen
kadikaaram pole nam snegam enben
iru ullam serum neram ethirpaathu ninrenae

kadhal oru butterfly pola varum
vanthaal adhu kannamoochi aadi vidum

Thondailukul sikkuthe oru vaarthai
sollamal pookuthe en vaazhkai
Unnai thoda vanthen naan theenda villai
manjal kotai vittu kaal thaandavillai

paneerai thuvuthe oru paaravai
vinmeenai thuvuthe maru paarthai
intha idaiveligal en kuraiya villai
un kadai vizhiyil en karunai illai

Ketkaamal unnai,
naan kaadhal seithen
karum paarai,
meethu mazhaiyaaga peithen
penne un ullam ennendru solven
pala kallai veesi
paarthum udaiyatha kannaadi

kadhal oru butterfly pola varum
vanthaal athu kannamoochi aadi vidum

Siru pillai pole pinnale oodu
kaanamal ponal kannale thedu
yemaatra paarkum pala murai
endraalum maatum oru murai
engedhan pogum adhu varai
poda nee kadhal varum varai
(vantha thottuko ..)

vantha thottuko thottuko
paniva pattuko pattuko
mudinja ottiko ottiko

kannaal othiko othiko
tholaal thothiko thothiko
thaniya kathiko kathiko

vantha thottuko thottuko
paniva pattuko pattuko
mudinja ottiko ottiko

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Oru Butterfly?

The song captures the whimsical and fluttering nature of love, likening it to a butterfly.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Aalap Raju, Hemachandran, and Sunitha Sarathy.

Who composed the music for Oru Kal Oru Kannadi?

The music was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song highlights the playful and romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the film's love story.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Oru Kal Oru Kannadi, Kadhal Oru Butterfly beautifully encapsulates the playful and enchanting nature of young love. The song's lively melody and heartfelt lyrics convey the excitement and joy of romance. Sung by Aalap Raju, Hemachandran, and Sunitha Sarathy, it brings a vibrant energy to the film. Harrish Jeyaraj's composition, paired with Na Muthukumar's poetic lyrics, creates a memorable musical experience that resonates with anyone who has ever felt the flutter of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the fluttering romance with Kadhal Oru Butterfly from Oru Kal Oru Kannadi. This enchanting melody, brought to life by the voices of Aalap Raju, Hemachandran, and Sunitha Sarathy, is a testament to Harrish Jeyaraj's musical genius. Let the lyrics by Na Muthukumar take you on a whimsical journey of love and joy.
stanzaMeanings: When it comes, touch it, touch it. Be humble, humble. If possible, hold it, hold it. With your eyes, see it, see it. With your heart, feel it, feel it. Learn it alone, learn it alone.
Love comes like a butterfly. When it arrives, it plays hide and seek.
Like a little child, run behind it. If it disappears, search with your eyes. Even if it deceives many times, it will change once. Until then, let it be, until love comes.
Love comes like a butterfly. When it arrives, it plays hide and seek.
When you look at me with excitement, I look at you with wonder. Does the rain pour, does the heart think, in the sea of the mind, do waves crash?
When you came to express your heart, you tied my heart with love. Does your cool gaze come to embrace me, does that wave save my life?
I placed my hand on the electricity, yet I touched you with love. I say our friendship is like a clock, waiting for the time when two hearts meet.
Love comes like a butterfly. When it arrives, it plays hide and seek.
A word is stuck in my throat, my life blooms without saying it. I came to touch you but didn't. I didn't cross the yellow line.
A bird sprinkles rose water, another bird sprinkles starlight. These breaks don't lessen my flaws, your eyes don't have mercy.
Without asking, I loved you. I rained on a hard rock. Girl, when will your heart tell me? Even after throwing many stones, the mirror didn't break.
Love comes like a butterfly. When it arrives, it plays hide and seek.
Like a little child, run behind it. If it disappears, search with your eyes. Even if it deceives many times, it will change once. Until then, let it be, until love comes.
When it comes, touch it, touch it. Be humble, humble. If possible, hold it, hold it.
With your eyes, see it, see it. With your heart, feel it, feel it. Learn it alone, learn it alone.
When it comes, touch it, touch it. Be humble, humble. If possible, hold it, hold it.
